title: Atomic Rule
description: Source-grounded normalized unit extracted from document content.

rule_id.description: Unique identifier for this atomic rule within the document.

paragraph_id.description: Stable source anchor: identifies the governing paragraph or split position within the source clause. For sentence-split rules, equals rule_id. For subclauses, derived from the subclause label.

clause_id.description: Identifier of the source clause this rule belongs to.

clause_number.description: Numeric or alphanumeric label of the clause within the document.

section.description: Section heading or name from the source document.

start_page.description: First page number in the source document where this rule appears.

end_page.description: Last page number in the source document where this rule appears.

rule_type.description: Classification of the rule type at the atomic level.

testability.description: Whether this rule is directly testable.

split_basis.description: How this rule was split from the source clause.

raw_text.description: The full text of the rule extracted from the source document.
